case_title: MICHAEL BROWN VS. IMBELLONI CONSTRUCTION CO. INC.

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BROWN, MICHAEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT IMBELLONI CONSTRUCTION CO. INC. $750.00 PRINCIPAL, $88.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $838.00, THE JUDGMENT REPRESENTS RETURN OF $350.00 DEDUCTED FROM PLAINTIFF'S SECURITY DEPOSIT, AND A RENT ADJUSTMENT FOR THE MONTHS OF NOVEMBER AND DECEMBER, 2007. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF BROWN, MICHAEL AS TO DEFENDANT IMBELLONI CONSTRUCTION CO. INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-30-2009 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JAN-07-2009, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT IMBELLONI CONSTRUCTION CO. INC.
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-30-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-30-2009 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY BROWN, MICHAEL AS TO DEFENDANT IMBELLONI CONSTRUCTION CO. INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-30-2009 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
COPYING FEES PAID BY PLAINTIFF BROWN, MICHAEL
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT IMBELLONI CONSTRUCTION CO. INC.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAY-01-2009 ORDERED DESTROYED
